hero.eyebrow: For days when you want to eat better, but have no time to prepare
hero.headlinePrefix: Want to eat well, but always
hero.subheadline: Diệp Châu introduces fresh Wolffia – a new, tiny, easy-to-use green ingredient that can be added to any familiar dish to make every meal fresher, simpler, and less stressful.
hero.supporting: No need to change your whole diet. Just something convenient enough that you'll actually want to use on busy days.

config.guarantee: 100% fresh harvested daily - Money-back guarantee if not fresh
config.scarcity: Limited to 50 portions/day to ensure peak freshness

faq.a: This is Diệp Châu Wolffia, a selected green protein, grown in high-tech greenhouses with pure filtered water and organic nutrients. Our process is clean and enclosed, so you can use it with complete peace of mind.

faq.q: Do I need to wash or cook it?
faq.a: No need. Just open the box and sprinkle it directly into porridge, smoothies, or salads and eat right away. Eating raw is the best way to keep 100% of the precious protein and Vitamin B12 in Wolffia.

Absolutely not. The taste is light and refreshing like cool water, with a slightly crunchy texture like caviar. Whatever dish you sprinkle it on, it takes on that flavor, making it extremely easy to eat, even for small children.

faq.q: Does it have a fishy or muddy smell?
faq.a: None at all. Because we don't harvest from natural ponds, but grow it in an enclosed greenhouse system with clean water. So it tastes very clean, not pungent, not fishy, and has no muddy smell.

faq.q: Can babies starting solids eat it?
faq.a: It's ideal. The seeds are super small, soft, and won't cause choking. Moms just need to sprinkle 1 teaspoon into a bowl of porridge, stir well, and the baby has added fiber and plant protein.

faq.q: Which package should I start with?
faq.a: If you're just trying it out, start with the 100g trial box for 49,000 VND. If you want to optimize product and shipping costs, the 3-Box or 5-Box Combo is a much better deal.
Yes. We support express delivery in HCMC. The product is harvested fresh, boxed, and delivered cold within the day to maintain crispness.

faq.q: How should it be stored properly?
faq.a: Upon receiving, immediately place it in the fridge at 4-8°C. Best consumed within 5-7 days. When using, remember to use a clean spoon, tightly close the lid, and do not put it in the freezer.

chatReviews.name: Lan Anh
messages: I thought my kid would spit it out because of the green color, but the tiny seeds made him think it was candy so he ate it all. Thankfully he's been going to the bathroom more regularly, saving me from forcing him to eat vegetables every meal.

chatReviews.name: Diệp Châu Wolffia
messages: Thank you! The small, slightly crunchy Wolffia seeds are often better received by kids than leafy greens. Just sprinkle it on familiar dishes and they'll eat it naturally.

chatReviews.name: Hoang
messages: Looking for a plant-based protein alternative to chicken breast so I don't get bored, and found this. Pouring 1 box into the blender with whey makes a quick drink without the bloating from beans.

chatReviews.name: Diệp Châu Wolffia
messages: That's right! Many customers who work out love it because they can add green protein while staying light, without the complex prep of normal snacks.

painSection.headline:
Knowing you should eat better is one thing.
Maintaining it daily is another.
painSection.subheadline: Most people do not lack eating awareness. Life is simply too busy, so meals are often made quickly, for convenience, to just get it done.
painSection.splitText1:
Moms are busy with kids and house.
Workers juggle jobs and countless small chores.
Those who want to eat healthier often give up because preparation takes too much time.
painSection.splitText2:
Want to eat greener, but hate the prep.
Want quick healthy meals that aren't boring.
Want self-care, but don't want extra work.
painSection.highlight:
What many really need isn't more pressure.
It's a better way to eat that is easy enough to do every day.

cards.title: Want to eat better but too busy
cards.text: Not enough time to plan menus, go to the market, cook, and clean up every day.

cards.title: Want to be healthier but hate prep
cards.text: Hate the cumbersome tasks of prepping, blanching, boiling, and blending vegetables.

cards.title: Want to maintain but easily give up
cards.text: Eating boiled food gets boring, diversifying takes effort, and eventually returning to old habits.

solutionSection.headline: Diệp Châu chooses Wolffia as a gentler green eating method for busy days
solutionSection.subheadline: Easy to add to familiar dishes. Quick. Looks beautiful. Doesn't feel like you are trying too hard.
solutionSection.body: Wolffia is an ingredient you can quickly add to salads, porridge, soups, noodles, or breakfast bowls. Just a little is enough to make a meal look fresher, more stylish, and makes eating well easier to restart.

benefitsSection.headline: Why does Wolffia suit those who want to eat better but lack time?
cards: Great for moms and busy folks
